name: SDLC Parallel Assessors Mixed Outcomes Pipeline
description: Software-delivery pipeline with two required assessors on the same subject revision.
outcome: A delivery output is cleared by multiple assessors before successor work can continue.

definition.process_instructions: The platform architecture lead defines the change. The parallel delivery engineer implements it. The release quality and release security assessors both evaluate the same subject revision in parallel. The parallel release manager packages the result only after all required assessments are clear.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this live workflow should accomplish

parameters.name: initial_revision_scope
parameters.description: What revision 1 must complete before any assessor-driven rework begins

parameters.name: quality_rework_scope
parameters.description: What revision 2 must add to clear the quality assessor without yet satisfying security-only rework

parameters.name: security_rework_scope
parameters.description: What revision 3 must add after the security rejection route is exercised

parameters.name: mixed_outcome_contract
parameters.description: Authored assessor outcome sequence across the three revisions

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is defined but not yet assigned.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The work item meets its acceptance criteria.

stages.name: implementation
stages.goal: The change is implemented and assessed.

checkpoints.name: implementation
checkpoints.goal: The change is implemented and assessed.
